类 PathNode

java.lang.Object
com.zenith.feature.pathfinder.calc.PathNode
public final class PathNode extends Object

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明
    double
    cost
    Total cost of getting from start to here Mutable and changed by PathFinder
    final double
    estimatedCostToGoal
    Cached, should always be equal to goal.heuristic(pos)
    int
    heapPosition
    Where is this node in the array flattenization of the binary heap?
    PathNode
    previous
    In the graph search, what previous node contributed to the cost Mutable and changed by PathFinder

    x
    The position of this node

  • 字段详细资料

    • x

      public final int x
      The position of this node

    • y

      public final int y

    • z

      public final int z

    • estimatedCostToGoal

      public final double estimatedCostToGoal
      Cached, should always be equal to goal.heuristic(pos)

    • cost

      public double cost
      Total cost of getting from start to here Mutable and changed by PathFinder

    • previous

      public PathNode previous
      In the graph search, what previous node contributed to the cost Mutable and changed by PathFinder

    • heapPosition

      public int heapPosition
      Where is this node in the array flattenization of the binary heap? Needed for decrease-key operations.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • PathNode

      public PathNode(int x, int y, int z, Goal goal)

  • 方法详细资料

    • combinedCost

      public double combinedCost()
      Should always be equal to estimatedCosttoGoal + cost Mutable and changed by PathFinder

      public boolean isOpen()
